pr.title: match more functions in stage.c and label many functions and few constants
pr.author: snuffysasa

summary: Matched and named a block of stage camera helper functions in src/melee/gr/stage.c, removing their handwritten assembly from asm/melee/gr/stage.s and propagating the new symbols through assembly callers. The work turned anonymous func_80224A54-style accessors into descriptive camera/blast-zone getters, named a few float constants such as degrees_2_radians, and added the Dolphin matrix/vector type include needed for Vec. Review focused on not creating a duplicate vector struct because Vec already exists in Dolphin headers; the author reported that this was fixed.
what_changed: Added C implementations/names for stage camera helper accessors in stage.c, including get_cam_bounds_left_offset, get_cam_bounds_right_offset, get_cam_bounds_top_offset, get_cam_bounds_bottom_offset, get_cam_pan_angle_radians, get_cam_max_depth, get_cam_zoom_rate, get_cam_track_ratio, and get_cam_track_smooth.
Added blast-zone offset helpers in stage.c: get_blast_zone_right_offset, get_blast_zone_left_offset, get_blast_zone_top_offset, and get_blast_zone_bottom_offset.

Matched additional nearby helpers that were previously in asm/melee/gr/stage.s, including calc_unk_cam_y_80224B98, calc_unk_cam_y_bounds_80224BC4, unk_set_vec3_to_cam_offset_80224BF8, get_pausecam_zpos_min, get_pausecam_zpos_init, get_pausecam_zpos_max, and get_cam_angle_radians_up/down/left/right.
Removed the corresponding assembly bodies for func_80224B98 through func_80224C94 from asm/melee/gr/stage.s, leaving later stage assembly in place.

Renamed float constants in variables/include context and assembly uses: lbl_804DBCD0 became degrees_2_radians, lbl_804DBCD4 became unk_one_half_const_804DBCD8, and lbl_804DBCD8 became unk_zero_const_804DBCD8 in the provided diff context.
Updated include/functions.h comments from anonymous func_80224A54-style names to the new descriptive camera/stage helper names.
Updated many assembly call sites across camera, fighter, item, and stage files so bl instructions refer to the new symbol names instead of the old func_80224Axx labels.
Added #include <dolphin/mtx/mtxtypes.h> to src/melee/gr/stage.h, providing the Dolphin Vec declaration used by unk_set_vec3_to_cam_offset_80224BF8.
smart_moves: The PR renamed tiny accessors according to the field they return, which made many otherwise opaque camera call sites more searchable without needing to decompile all callers first.

It kept unknown behavior honest by using names such as calc_unk_cam_y_80224B98 and unk_set_vec3_to_cam_offset_80224BF8 where the exact purpose was not fully established, while still recording the address for traceability.
It propagated symbol renames into assembly callers immediately, so future decompilation can infer semantics from call names in files that remain assembly-only.
The reviewer-requested use of Dolphin's existing Vec avoided introducing a duplicate local vector struct and aligned stage.c/stage.h with project-wide SDK type conventions.
The degree-to-radian constant was named by observed use in functions that multiply camera angle fields, making the constant reusable and easier to validate.
decomp_lessons: For small accessors, matching can be done safely by reading the _StageInfo field offsets and expressing the direct field access in C; descriptive getter names then help unlock larger camera functions later.
When a helper writes x/y/z vector fields, first check Dolphin headers for existing types such as Vec before inventing a project-local struct.
Use address-suffixed unk names when behavior is only partially understood; this is better than overclaiming while still making cross-references searchable.
Constant labels should be upgraded when their numeric role is clear from usage, such as 0.017453f as degrees_2_radians and 0.5 as a half multiplier.
After matching a group of functions, update remaining assembly references in all dependent files so the semantic naming benefit spreads beyond the newly decompiled C file.
Stage camera bounds and blast-zone helpers consistently add cam_x_offset or cam_y_offset to stage_info fields; this pattern is reusable when identifying related accessors.
naming_conventions: Getter names use get_ + subsystem/field semantics, e.g. get_cam_bounds_left_offset, get_cam_zoom_rate, get_pausecam_zpos_max.
Camera angle conversion helpers explicitly mention radians, e.g. get_cam_pan_angle_radians and get_cam_angle_radians_right.
Unknown-but-matched helpers preserve the address suffix, e.g. calc_unk_cam_y_80224B98 and unk_set_vec3_to_cam_offset_80224BF8.
Constants can be renamed from lbl_ addresses to role names when value and usage are clear, e.g. degrees_2_radians for 0.017453f.
Less-understood constants retained an unk_ prefix plus role/value hint, e.g. unk_one_half_const_804DBCD8 and unk_zero_const_804DBCD8.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Deleted matched assembly bodies from asm/melee/gr/stage.s for the newly implemented C functions rather than leaving duplicate definitions.
Preserved address traceability in uncertain function names while replacing func_80224Axx labels in assembly call sites.
Updated bl targets across many assembly files without changing instruction bytes, turning symbol-only diffs into documentation for still-unmatched code.
Used simple C expressions over stage_info.cam_info and stage_info.blast_zone fields to match short leaf functions.
For the vector helper, matching used Vec * and direct x/y/z assignments to stage_info camera offsets plus zero constant.
review_feedback: PsiLupan on src/melee/gr/stage.c: "Vec is already declared as in the Dolphin includes."
PsiLupan review summary: "Use the Vec already declared in Dolphin and remove the struct you created, and you should be good."
Author replied in an issue comment quoting the review request and saying "done", indicating the custom struct was removed in favor of Dolphin Vec.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that renamed calc_unk_cam_y_80224B98 or unk_set_vec3_to_cam_offset_80224BF8 to final semantic names.
Search for subsequent StageInfo/cam_info struct refinements affecting fields x20, x24, cam_angle_up/down/left/right, and pausecam_zpos_* fields.
Check whether unk_one_half_const_804DBCD8 and unk_zero_const_804DBCD8 were later corrected, since the names in this slice appear address/value-oriented rather than final semantic labels.
Look for later decompilation of callers in asm/melee/cm/code_80028B9C.s that benefited from the camera getter names.
